selections.name: Dusty Bay

selections.name: Mailata

selections.reason: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Solid rating and a major player.

selections.reason: Form hard to fault. Won well last start and should get a great trip from the good draw.

danger_horse.name: Mailata
